shapes.title: Client intake
shapes.description: One form creates the record everywhere. No retyping into email, sheets, or your CRM.

shapes.title: Ops dashboard
shapes.description: What needs you today, what's stuck, and what's due. Pulled from the tools you already use.

shapes.title: Document tracking
shapes.description: Sent, opened, signed. No digging through inboxes or chasing status by hand.

shapes.title: Email organization
shapes.description: Inbox sorted, labeled, and routed. Less noise, faster replies, nothing important buried.

shapes.title: Automated reporting
shapes.description: Daily, Monday morning, or monthly summaries from your tools, delivered on schedule.

shapes.title: Lead & prospect research
shapes.description: A new inquiry arrives with context from the web and your systems. Your team walks in prepared.

shapes.title: Workflow automation
shapes.description: Repetitive work on autopilot, with human checkpoints where judgment matters.

shapes.title: Follow-ups & reminders
shapes.description: When you're waiting on someone else, timed nudges and drafts so nothing sits forgotten.
